validation_cycles.overview: The Plan Validator IS the validation cycle. It does not have a separate "self-validation" phase like authoring agents. Instead, it runs internal self-checks to ensure it performed its job correctly before reporting completion.

checks.check: Every artifact in the provided list was read, or marked as MISSING with explanation.
No artifact was skipped without documentation.
Missing artifacts are listed in the report with impact (which checks couldn't run).
Traceability check was run (on available artifacts).
Consistency check was run (on available artifacts).
Completeness check was run (on available artifacts).

category.name: no_skipped_checks
category.description: Checks were not skipped without reason.

checks.check: If a check was skipped (e.g., due to missing artifact), it is documented in the report.
Rationale for any skip is clear (e.g., "Traceability check partial: PRD missing").

category.name: coverage_metrics
category.description: Coverage metrics are calculated and reported.

checks.check: Traceability percentage (or equivalent) is calculated and reported.
Finding counts by severity are reported.

validator_completion_criteria.rule: Run self-check before declaring completion to the hub.
If any self-check fails, address before reporting (e.g., run missing check, add missing metric).
The validator's output is the report. The self-check ensures the report is complete and accurate.
